name: Hypo recovery bounce
description: BG drops from 7.0 to 3.8 between 16:00 and 17:00, then recovers sharply to 11.0 by 17:40 after fast-acting sugar. Tests that nudges fire on the way down, stop once recovery begins (rising from below target = no nudge needed), and do not re-fire on the overshoot above target range.
